name: Lifesteal SMP season 6
description:
Hey so uhh . . . yeah first tie making one of these, but i sense a distinct lack of interesting things for this.

Clearly meant for proxy, take a swing at it if ya want though.
Dont complain about token count, I know, it's "not ideal" I know its a "bad idea" I dont care. Dont wanna sound rude but kinda hard not to lol.

Have fun, yata yata all the good stuff.
No gooning, I dont care if they're 18.
creator: Doomsman
